name: Frost Per Tone Unsustained Demo

phrases.comment: Three clear source notes with rests between them. The gaps make it easier to hear that frost_effect now seeds a local bloom from every audible tone instead of only the earliest audible note.

score_transforms.comment: One frost iteration per audible seed. sustain_notes is omitted so each local bloom keeps its normal short staggered note durations.
score_transforms.name: frost_effect

description: Demonstrates the refactored frost behavior with sustain_notes left off. Each audible note becomes its own local frost seed, so you hear three separate frost blooms following the three-note source line.
